---
title: "GP_PaymentGraps_SQL"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  fig.width = 12,
  fig.height = 5,
  dpi = 400
)

```

```{R load_imd}
library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(writexl)

#To ensure non-scientific outputs
options(scipen = 999)

#Step 1 practice filtering logic

#create list of relevant metrics to include as the same metric for average registerd patients changes from year to year
relevant_metrics <- c("Average Number of Registered Patients", 
                      "Number of Registered Patients (Last Known Figure)", 
                      "Average number of registered patients1")

#Remove any practices with less than 100 registered patients 
filtered_for_metrics <- finance_datasets %>%
  filter(Metric %in% relevant_metrics) %>%
  group_by(YEAR, Practice_Code) %>%
  filter(any(Metric_Value < 1000)) %>%
  ungroup()

#Hidden logic to check for removed practices
excluded_small_practices <- finance_datasets %>%
  filter(Metric %in% relevant_metrics) %>%
  filter(YEAR == "2024") %>%
  group_by(YEAR, Practice_Code) %>%
  filter(any(Metric_Value < 1000)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  distinct(YEAR, Practice_Code)

excluded_small_imd_2024 <- excluded_small_practices %>%
  left_join(prac_imd, by = c("YEAR", "Practice_Code" = "PRACTICE_CODE"))

#Anti-join to remove
finance_datasets_filtered <- finance_datasets %>%
  anti_join(filtered_for_metrics, by = c("YEAR", "Practice_Code"))

#Metrics for average payments per registered payment
relevant_metrics_average <- c("AveragePaymentsPerRegisteredPatient_£", 
                      "Average payments per registered patient", 
                      "Average payments per registered patient1")
                 
#remove top and bottom 0.5% by average payment per registered patinet 
outliers_005pct <- finance_datasets_filtered %>%
  filter(Metric %in% relevant_metrics_average) %>%
  group_by(YEAR) %>%
  mutate(
    p005 = quantile(Metric_Value, 0.005, na.rm = TRUE),
    p995 = quantile(Metric_Value, 0.995, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(Metric_Value <= p005 | Metric_Value >= p995) %>%
  distinct(YEAR, Practice_Code)

#Hidden logic to look at excluded outliers
Test_outliers_005pct <- finance_datasets %>%
  anti_join(excluded_small_practices, by = c("YEAR", "Practice_Code")) %>%
  filter(Metric %in% relevant_metrics_average) %>%
  group_by(YEAR) %>%
  mutate(
    p005 = quantile(Metric_Value, 0.005, na.rm = TRUE),
    p995 = quantile(Metric_Value, 0.995, na.rm = TRUE),
    tail = case_when(
      Metric_Value <= p005 ~ "bottom_0_5",
      Metric_Value >= p995 ~ "top_0_5",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(!is.na(tail)) %>%
  distinct(YEAR, Practice_Code, tail)

excluded_small_imd <- excluded_small_practices %>%
  left_join(prac_imd, by = c("YEAR", "Practice_Code" = "PRACTICE_CODE")) %>%
  filter(!is.na(IMD_QUINTILE))

excluded_outliers_imd <- Test_outliers_005pct %>%
  left_join(prac_imd, by = c("YEAR", "Practice_Code" = "PRACTICE_CODE")) %>%
  filter(!is.na(IMD_QUINTILE))

excluded_small_summary <- excluded_small_imd %>%
  group_by(YEAR, IMD_QUINTILE) %>%
  summarise(
    n_excluded_small = n_distinct(Practice_Code),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

excluded_outliers_summary <- excluded_outliers_imd %>%
  group_by(YEAR, IMD_QUINTILE, tail) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n_distinct(Practice_Code),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = tail,
    values_from = n,
    values_fill = 0
  )


finance_datasets_filtered <- finance_datasets_filtered %>%
  anti_join(outliers_005pct, by = c("YEAR", "Practice_Code"))

finance_imd_wide <- finance_datasets_filtered %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = Metric, 
    values_from = Metric_Value
  )

# Define the columns to rename
columns <- list(
  PRACTICE_CODE = "Practice_Code",
  WEIGHTED_PATIENTS = c("Average Number of Weighted Patients", 
                        "Number of Weighted Patients (Last Known Figure)",
                        "Average number of weighted patients1"),
  REGISTERED_PATIENTS = c("Average Number of Registered Patients", 
                          "Number of Registered Patients (Last Known Figure)",
                          "Average number of registered patients1"),
  PAYMENTS = "Total NHS Payments to General Practice",
  PAYMENTS_MINUS_DEDUCTIONS = c("Total NHS Payments to General Practice Minus Deductions",
                                "Total NHS Payments to General Practice Minus Deductions2")
)

#This code creates a single year (23/24) of data for GP payments 
finances_df_barchart <- finance_datasets_filtered %>%
  filter(YEAR == "2024")%>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = Metric, 
    values_from = Metric_Value
  ) 

#Rename into simple names 
columns_barplot <- list(
    PRACTICE_CODE = "Practice_Code",
    CONTRACT_TYPE = "Contract_Type",
    WEIGHTED_PATIENTS = "Average Number of Weighted Patients", 
    REGISTERED_PATIENTS = "Average Number of Registered Patients",
    PAYMENTS_MINUS_DEDUCTIONS = "Total NHS Payments to General Practice Minus Deductions",
    PAYMENTS = "Total NHS Payments to General Practice",
    TOTAL_COVID_PAYMENTS = "Total NHS Payments to General Practice including covid vaccination, covid support and long covid payments",
    PRESCRIBING_FEE = "Prescribing Fee Payments",
    DISPENSING_FEE = "Dispensing Fee Payments",
    REINBURSMENT_FEE = "Reimbursement of Drugs",
    OTHER_PAYMENTS = "Other Payments",
    GLOBAL_SUM = "Global Sum",
    MPIG = "MPIG Correction factor",
    IT = "Information Management and Technology",
    PMS_BALANCE = "Balance of PMS Expenditure",
    QOF_PAYMENT = "Total QOF Payments",
    CHILD_VACCINE = "Childhood Vaccination and Immunisation Scheme",
    FLU_VACCINE = "Influenza and Pneumococcal Immunisations",
    ROTAVIRUS_VACCINE = "Rotavirus and Shingles Immunisation",
    RESP_SYNC_VIRUS = "Respiratory Syncytial Virus",
    PREMISES_PAYMENT = "Premises Payments",
    COVID_IMMUN = "Covid Immunisation",
    COVID_SUPPORT = "Covid Support and Expansion",
    LONG_COVID = "Long Covid",
    GP_EXTENDED = "GP Extended Hours Access",
    LD = "Learning Disabilities",
    MS = "Minor Surgery",
    SFVP = "Services for Violent Patients",
    NDES = "Non DES Item Pneumococcal Vaccine, Childhood Immunisation Main Programme",
    OOAIHUC = "Out Of Area in Hours Urgent Care",
    MENINGITIS = "Meningitis",
    PERTUSSIS = "Pertussis",
    LIS = "Local Incentive Schemes",
    WMS = "Weight Management Service",
    MAR = "Medical Assessment Reviews",
    SENIORITY = "Seniority",
    DRSP = "Doctors Retainer Scheme Payments",
    TLA = "Total Locum Allowances",
    PCO = "PCO Admin Other",
    GPT = "General Practice Transformation",
    WAF = "winter Access Fund",
    PSL = "Prolonged Study Leave",
    AACIRL = "Appraisal - Appraiser Costs in Respect of Locums",
    PCNP = "PCN Participation",
    DEDUCTIONS = "Deductions for Pensions, Levies and Prescription Charge Income"
)

finances_df_barchart <- finances_df_barchart %>%
  rename(!!!columns_barplot)

#group into defined categories (refer to excel for latest)

globalSum <- c("GLOBAL_SUM", "MPIG", "PMS_BALANCE")
ITPremises <- c("PREMISES_PAYMENT", "IT")
OtherAndPCOAdmin <- c(
  "SENIORITY", "DRSP", "TLA", "PCO", "OTHER_PAYMENTS", "PSL", "AACIRL")
PCNParticipation <- c("PCNP")
QOF <- c("QOF_PAYMENT")
DirectedEnhancedServices <- c(
  "CHILD_VACCINE", "FLU_VACCINE", "LD",
  "MS", "ROTAVIRUS_VACCINE", "SFVP", "OOAIHUC", "MENINGITIS", "PERTUSSIS", "WMS", "MAR", "NDES", "RESP_SYNC_VIRUS")
LocalIncentiveSchemes <- c("LIS")
AccessAndTransFormation <- c("GPT", "WAF", "GP_EXTENDED")
COVID <- c("COVID_IMMUN", "COVID_SUPPORT", "LONG_COVID")
PrescribingFee <- c("PRESCRIBING_FEE")
Dispensing <- c("DISPENSING_FEE")
DrugReinbursement <- c("REINBURSMENT_FEE")
Deductions <- c("DEDUCTIONS")

#ensure covid columns are numeric
finances_df_barchart <- finances_df_barchart %>%
  mutate(across(any_of(LocalIncentiveSchemes), as.numeric))

#calculate grouped totals 
finances_GROUPED_TOTAL <- finances_df_barchart %>%
  mutate(
    Total.Global.Sum          = rowSums(across(all_of(globalSum)), na.rm = TRUE),
    Total.COVID          = rowSums(across(all_of(COVID)), na.rm = TRUE),
    Total.IT.Premises         = rowSums(across(all_of(ITPremises)), na.rm = TRUE),
    Total.OtherAndPCOAdmin   = rowSums(across(all_of(OtherAndPCOAdmin)), na.rm = TRUE),
    Total.DirectedEnhancedServices = rowSums(across(all_of(DirectedEnhancedServices)), na.rm = TRUE),
    Total.AccessAndTransFormation = rowSums(across(all_of(AccessAndTransFormation)), na.rm = TRUE)
  )

#join IMD onto and then group by year and imd, add the avg registered and weighted columns for each group as well
finances_IMD_TOTAL <- finances_GROUPED_TOTAL %>%
  left_join(prac_imd, by = c("YEAR", "PRACTICE_CODE")) %>%
  filter(!is.na(IMD_QUINTILE)) %>%
  mutate(IMD_QUINTILE = as.factor(IMD_QUINTILE)) %>%
  group_by(IMD_QUINTILE, YEAR) %>%
  summarise(
    Global_Sum          = sum(Total.Global.Sum, na.rm = TRUE),
    IT_Premises         = sum(Total.IT.Premises, na.rm = TRUE),
    Other_And_PCOAdmin  = sum(Total.OtherAndPCOAdmin, na.rm = TRUE),
    Directed_Enhanced_Services = sum(Total.DirectedEnhancedServices, na.rm = TRUE),
    ACCESSANDTRANSFORMATION = sum(Total.AccessAndTransFormation, na.rm = TRUE),
    Local_Incentive_Schemes = sum(LIS, na.rm = TRUE),
    Prescribing         = sum(PRESCRIBING_FEE, na.rm = TRUE),
    Dispensing          = sum(DISPENSING_FEE, na.rm = TRUE),
    DrugReinbursement   = sum(REINBURSMENT_FEE, na.rm = TRUE),
    QOF                 = sum(QOF_PAYMENT, na.rm = TRUE),
    Deductions          = sum(DEDUCTIONS, na.rm = TRUE),
    PCNPARTICIPATION    = sum(PCNP, na.rm = TRUE),

    REGISTERED          = sum(REGISTERED_PATIENTS, na.rm = TRUE),
    WEIGHTED            = sum(WEIGHTED_PATIENTS, na.rm = TRUE),

    N_PRACTICES         = n_distinct(PRACTICE_CODE),
    AVG_PRACTICE_SIZE   = mean(REGISTERED_PATIENTS, na.rm = TRUE),
    AVG_WEIGHTED_PRACTICE     = mean(WEIGHTED_PATIENTS, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(across(
    c(Global_Sum, IT_Premises, Other_And_PCOAdmin, Directed_Enhanced_Services,
      Local_Incentive_Schemes, Prescribing, Dispensing, DrugReinbursement,
      QOF, Deductions, PCNPARTICIPATION, ACCESSANDTRANSFORMATION),
    list(
      "Avg (Registered)" = ~ . / REGISTERED,
      "Avg (Weighted)"   = ~ . / WEIGHTED
    ),
    .names = "{.col} {fn}"
  ))

#pivot long
finances_IMD_TOTAL <- finances_IMD_TOTAL %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -c(IMD_QUINTILE, YEAR),
    names_to = "Payment Category",
    values_to = "Total (£)"
  )

#create a uniform payment category column
finances_IMD_TOTAL <- finances_IMD_TOTAL %>%
  mutate(
    PayCat_base = str_trim(
      str_remove(`Payment Category`,
                 regex("\\((Registered|Weighted|ADJ)\\)$", ignore_case = TRUE))
    )
  )

#order levels for barplots
ordered_levels_avg <- rev(c(
  "Global_Sum Avg",
  "IT_Premises Avg",
  "QOF Avg",
  "Local_Incentive_Schemes Avg",
  "Directed_Enhanced_Services Avg",
  "ACCESSANDTRANSFORMATION Avg",
  "PCNPARTICIPATION Avg",
 # "COVID_19 Avg",
  "Other_And_PCOAdmin Avg",
  "Prescribing Avg",
  "Dispensing Avg",
  "DrugReinbursement Avg",
  "Deductions Avg"
))

ordered_levels_sum <- rev(c(
   "Global_Sum",
  "IT_Premises",
  "QOF",
  "Local_Incentive_Schemes",
  "Directed_Enhanced_Services",
  "ACCESSANDTRANSFORMATION",
  "PCNPARTICIPATION",
 # "COVID_19 Avg",
  "Other_And_PCOAdmin",
  "Prescribing",
  "Dispensing",
  "DrugReinbursement",
  "Deductions"
))

Total_Finance_Categories <- finances_IMD_TOTAL %>%
  mutate(
    PayCat_base = factor(PayCat_base, levels = ordered_levels_sum)
  )

Avg_Finance_Categories <- finances_IMD_TOTAL %>%
  mutate(
    PayCat_base = factor(PayCat_base, levels = ordered_levels_avg)
  )

#legacy graph code hidden
#Weighted_By_Year <- ggplot(finance_imd_weighted, aes(
#  x = YEAR,
 # y = PAYMENT_PER_WEIGHTED_PATIENT,
#  color = as.factor(IMD_QUINTILE),
#  group = IMD_QUINTILE
 # )) +
  #geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  #geom_point(size = 2) +
  #scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set1", name = "IMD Quintile") +
 # scale_x_continuous(
 #   breaks = sort(unique(finance_imd_weighted$YEAR)),  
 #   labels = sort(unique(finance_imd_weighted$YEAR))
 # ) +
 # labs(
 #   title = "Payments per Weighted Patient by IMD Quintile",
  #  x = "Year",
 #   y = "Payment per Weighted Patient (£)"
 # ) +
#  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
#  theme(
#    legend.position = "right",
 #   panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
  #  strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  #)

#Registered_By_Year <- ggplot(finance_imd_registered, aes(
 # x = YEAR,
#  y = PAYMENT_PER_REGISTERED_PATIENT,
 # color = as.factor(IMD_QUINTILE),
#  group = IMD_QUINTILE
#)) +
 # geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  #geom_point(size = 2) +
  #scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set1", name = "IMD Quintile") +
  #scale_x_continuous(
  #  breaks = sort(unique(finance_imd_registered$YEAR)),  
  #  labels = sort(unique(finance_imd_registered$YEAR))
  #) +
 # labs(
  #  title = "Payments per Registered Patient by IMD Quintile",
   # x = "Year",
  #  y = "Payment per Registered Patient (£)"
  #) +
  #theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  #theme(
 #   legend.position = "right",
#    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
 #   strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
 # )

#Registered Patients by IMD Bar Chart
Registered_Patients_Finance_Categories <- Avg_Finance_Categories %>%
  filter(
    YEAR == 2024,
    grepl("\\(Registered\\)$", `Payment Category`),  
    !is.na(IMD_QUINTILE)
  ) %>%
  mutate(PayCat_base = factor(PayCat_base, levels = ordered_levels_avg)) %>%
  group_by(IMD_QUINTILE) %>%
  mutate(
    group_total = sum(`Total (£)`),
    pct = `Total (£)` / group_total,
    label_text = paste0(
      scales::percent(pct, accuracy = 1), 
      " (", scales::comma(`Total (£)`, accuracy = 0.1), ")"
    )
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

Barchart_Registered_Patients_By_Categories <- ggplot(Registered_Patients_Finance_Categories, aes(
  x = `Total (£)`,
  y = IMD_QUINTILE,
  fill =  PayCat_base
)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  geom_text(
   aes(label = paste0(
      scales::percent(pct, accuracy = 1),  # Percentage (50%)
      "\n(", scales::comma(`Total (£)`, accuracy = 0.1), ")"  # Raw number in brackets
    )),
    size = 2,
    position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5),
    hjust = 0.5
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Average NHS Payments per Registered Patient by IMD Quintile (2024)",
    x = "IMD Quintile (1 = Most Deprived, 5 = Least Deprived)",
    y = "Average Payment per Registered Patient (£)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold"),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12)
  )

#Weighted Patientes by IMD Bar chart
Weighted_Patients_Finance_Categories <- Avg_Finance_Categories %>%
  filter(
    YEAR == 2024,
    grepl("\\(Weighted\\)$", `Payment Category`),
    !is.na(IMD_QUINTILE)
  ) %>%
  mutate(PayCat_base = factor(PayCat_base, levels = ordered_levels_avg)) %>%
  group_by(IMD_QUINTILE) %>%
  mutate(
    group_total = sum(`Total (£)`),
    pct = `Total (£)` / group_total,
    label_text = paste0(
      scales::percent(pct, accuracy = 1), 
      " (", scales::comma(`Total (£)`, accuracy = 0.1), ")"
    )
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

Barchart_Weighted_Patients_By_Categories <- ggplot(
  Weighted_Patients_Finance_Categories,
  aes(
    x = `Total (£)`,
    y = as.factor(IMD_QUINTILE),
    fill = PayCat_base
  )
) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  geom_text(
   aes(label = paste0(
      scales::percent(pct, accuracy = 1),  # Percentage (50%)
      "\n(", scales::comma(`Total (£)`, accuracy = 0.1), ")"  # Raw number in brackets
    )),
    size = 2,
    position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5),
    hjust = 0.5
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Average NHS Payments per Weighted Patient by IMD Quintile (2024)",
    x = "IMD Quintile (1 = Most Deprived, 5 = Least Deprived)",
    y = "Average Payment per Weighted Patient (£)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold"),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12)
  )

#This code groups by total practices for the overall bar chart 
#Join IMD onto and then group by year and imd, add the avg registered and weighted columns for each group as well
finances_TOTAL <- finances_GROUPED_TOTAL %>%
  left_join(prac_imd, by = c("YEAR", "PRACTICE_CODE")) %>%
  filter(!is.na(IMD_QUINTILE)) %>%
  mutate(IMD_QUINTILE = as.factor(IMD_QUINTILE)) %>%
  group_by(YEAR) %>%
  summarise(
    Global_Sum          = sum(Total.Global.Sum, na.rm = TRUE),
    IT_Premises         = sum(Total.IT.Premises, na.rm = TRUE),
   # COVID_19         = sum(Total.COVID, na.rm = TRUE),
    Other_And_PCOAdmin  = sum(Total.OtherAndPCOAdmin, na.rm = TRUE),
    Directed_Enhanced_Services = sum(Total.DirectedEnhancedServices, na.rm = TRUE),
    ACCESSANDTRANSFORMATION = sum(Total.AccessAndTransFormation, na.rm = TRUE),
    Local_Incentive_Schemes = sum(LIS, na.rm = TRUE),
    Prescribing         = sum(PRESCRIBING_FEE, na.rm = TRUE),
    Dispensing          = sum(DISPENSING_FEE, na.rm = TRUE),
    DrugReinbursement   = sum(REINBURSMENT_FEE, na.rm = TRUE),
    QOF                 = sum(QOF_PAYMENT, na.rm = TRUE),
    Deductions          = sum(DEDUCTIONS, na.rm = TRUE),
    PCNPARTICIPATION          = sum(PCNP, na.rm = TRUE),
    REGISTERED          = sum(REGISTERED_PATIENTS, na.rm = TRUE),
    WEIGHTED            = sum(WEIGHTED_PATIENTS, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(across(
    c(Global_Sum, IT_Premises, Other_And_PCOAdmin, Directed_Enhanced_Services, Local_Incentive_Schemes, Prescribing, Dispensing, DrugReinbursement, QOF, Deductions, PCNPARTICIPATION, ACCESSANDTRANSFORMATION, #COVID_19#
      ),
    list(
      "Avg (Registered)" = ~ . / REGISTERED,
      "Avg (Weighted)"   = ~ . / WEIGHTED
    ),
    .names = "{.col} {fn}"
  ))

#pivot long
finances_TOTAL <- finances_TOTAL %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -c(YEAR),
    names_to = "Payment Category",
    values_to = "Total (£)"
  )

#create a uniform payment category column
finances_TOTAL <- finances_TOTAL %>%
  mutate(
    PayCat_base = str_trim(
      str_remove(`Payment Category`,
                 regex("\\((Registered|Weighted|ADJ)\\)$", ignore_case = TRUE))
    )
  )

ALL_ordered_levels_avg <- rev(c(
  "Global_Sum Avg",
  "IT_Premises Avg",
  "QOF Avg",
  "Local_Incentive_Schemes Avg",
  "Directed_Enhanced_Services Avg",
  "ACCESSANDTRANSFORMATION Avg",
  "PCNPARTICIPATION Avg",
  "COVID_19 Avg",
  "Other_And_PCOAdmin Avg",
  "Prescribing Avg",
  "Dispensing Avg",
  "DrugReinbursement Avg",
  "Deductions Avg"
))

ALL_Avg_Finance_Categories <- finances_TOTAL %>%
  mutate(
    PayCat_base = factor(PayCat_base, levels = ALL_ordered_levels_avg)
  )

# Apply the factor ordering and filtering in one go
Registered_Patients_Finance_Categories_ALL <- ALL_Avg_Finance_Categories %>%
  filter(
    YEAR == 2024,
    grepl("\\(Registered\\)$", `Payment Category`)  
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    PayCat_base = factor(PayCat_base, levels = ALL_ordered_levels_avg),
    group_total = sum(`Total (£)`),  
    pct = `Total (£)` / group_total,  
    label_text = paste0(
      scales::percent(pct, accuracy = 1), 
      " (", scales::comma(`Total (£)`, accuracy = 1), ")" 
    )
  ) %>%
  ungroup()  

Barchart_Registered_Patients_By_Categories_ALL <- ggplot(
  Registered_Patients_Finance_Categories_ALL, 
  aes(
    x = pct,  
    y = "", 
    fill = PayCat_base  
  )
) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", width = 1, position = "stack") +  
  geom_text(
    aes(label = paste0(
      scales::percent(pct, accuracy = 1), 
      "\n(", scales::comma(`Total (£)`, accuracy = 1), ")" 
    )),
    size = 3,  
    position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5), 
    hjust = 0.5  
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Average NHS Payments per Registered Patient (2024)",
    x = "Percentage of Total Payments (%)",  
    y = NULL  
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y = element_blank(), 
    axis.title.y = element_blank(), 
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold"), 
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12)
  )

#write_xlsx(finances_Practice, "Finances_Practice.xlsx")

#variation across practices 
finances_Practice <- finances_GROUPED_TOTAL %>%
  left_join(prac_imd, by = c("YEAR", "PRACTICE_CODE")) %>%    
  filter(!is.na(IMD_QUINTILE), YEAR == 2024) %>%                
  mutate(IMD_QUINTILE = as.factor(IMD_QUINTILE)) %>%             
  group_by(YEAR, PRACTICE_CODE) %>%                              
  summarise(
    Global_Sum          = sum(Total.Global.Sum, na.rm = TRUE),
    IT_Premises         = sum(Total.IT.Premises, na.rm = TRUE),
    Other_And_PCOAdmin  = sum(Total.OtherAndPCOAdmin, na.rm = TRUE),
    Directed_Enhanced_Services = sum(Total.DirectedEnhancedServices, na.rm = TRUE),
    ACCESSANDTRANSFORMATION = sum(Total.AccessAndTransFormation, na.rm = TRUE),
    Local_Incentive_Schemes = sum(LIS, na.rm = TRUE),
    Prescribing         = sum(PRESCRIBING_FEE, na.rm = TRUE),
    Dispensing          = sum(DISPENSING_FEE, na.rm = TRUE),
    DrugReinbursement   = sum(REINBURSMENT_FEE, na.rm = TRUE),
    QOF                 = sum(QOF_PAYMENT, na.rm = TRUE),
    PCNPARTICIPATION    = sum(PCNP, na.rm = TRUE),
    Deductions          = sum(DEDUCTIONS, na.rm = TRUE),
    REGISTERED          = sum(REGISTERED_PATIENTS, na.rm = TRUE),
    WEIGHTED            = sum(WEIGHTED_PATIENTS, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )%>%
  mutate(
    Total_Funding = Global_Sum + IT_Premises + Other_And_PCOAdmin +
                    Directed_Enhanced_Services + ACCESSANDTRANSFORMATION +
                    Local_Incentive_Schemes + Prescribing + Dispensing +
                    DrugReinbursement + QOF + PCNPARTICIPATION + Deductions,

    `Avg (Registered)` = Total_Funding / REGISTERED,
    `Avg (Weighted)`   = Total_Funding / WEIGHTED
  )

finances_Practice_binned <- finances_Practice %>%
  mutate(
    `Registered Group` = cut(
      `Avg (Registered)`,
      breaks = c(seq(0, 500, by = 10), Inf),
      right = FALSE,
      include.lowest = TRUE,
      labels = c(
        paste(seq(0, 490, by = 10), seq(9, 499, by = 10), sep = "-"),
        "500+"
      )
    ),
    `Weighted Group` = cut(
      `Avg (Weighted)`,
      breaks = c(seq(0, 500, by = 10), Inf),
      right = FALSE,
      include.lowest = TRUE,
      labels = c(
        paste(seq(0, 490, by = 10), seq(9, 499, by = 10), sep = "-"),
        "500+"
      )
    )
  )

# Reshape data to long format 
finances_Practice_binned_long <- finances_Practice_binned %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(`Registered Group`, `Weighted Group`), 
               names_to = "Metric", 
               values_to = "Bin")

# create histogram 
paymentVariation <- ggplot(finances_Practice_binned_long) +
  geom_bar(aes(x = Bin, fill = Metric), position = "dodge", alpha = 0.7, width = 0.8) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Registered Group" = "blue", "Weighted Group" = "red")) +
  labs(x = "Practices by average Registered and Weighted payments per capita Grouped into £10 Intervals", 
       y = "Count of Practices", 
       title = "Variation in payments per capita across practices") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1), 
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 12), 
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 12),
        legend.title = element_blank())

#find the mean and median payments for weighted and registered 
summary_payments_registered <- finances_Practice %>%
  filter(`Avg (Registered)` >= 0) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_payment   = weighted.mean(`Avg (Registered)`, w = REGISTERED, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_payment = median(`Avg (Registered)`, na.rm = TRUE),
    p5_payment     = quantile(`Avg (Registered)`, 0.05, na.rm = TRUE),
    p95_payment    = quantile(`Avg (Registered)`, 0.95, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

summary_payments_weighted <- finances_Practice %>%
  filter(`Avg (Weighted)` >= 0) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_payment   = weighted.mean(`Avg (Weighted)`, w = WEIGHTED, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_payment = median(`Avg (Weighted)`, na.rm = TRUE),
    p5_payment     = quantile(`Avg (Weighted)`, 0.05, na.rm = TRUE),
    p95_payment    = quantile(`Avg (Weighted)`, 0.95, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

finances_Practice_binned <- finances_Practice %>%
  mutate(
    `Registered Bin` = cut(
      `Avg (Registered)`,
      breaks = c(seq(0, 500, by = 10), Inf),
      right = FALSE,
      include.lowest = TRUE,
      labels = c(
        paste(seq(0, 490, by = 10), seq(9, 499, by = 10), sep = "-"),
        "500+"
      )
    ),

    `Weighted Bin` = cut(
      `Avg (Weighted)`,
      breaks = c(seq(0, 500, by = 10), Inf),
      right = FALSE,
      include.lowest = TRUE,
      labels = c(
        paste(seq(0, 490, by = 10), seq(9, 499, by = 10), sep = "-"),
        "500+"
      )
    )
  )

#Count number of practices in each bin for both Registered and Weighted
finances_Practice_binned_summary <- finances_Practice_binned %>%
  group_by(`Registered Bin`, `Weighted Bin`) %>%
  summarise(
    Count_Registered_Practices = n_distinct(PRACTICE_CODE[!is.na(`Avg (Registered)`)]), 
    Count_Weighted_Practices = n_distinct(PRACTICE_CODE[!is.na(`Avg (Weighted)`)]),   
    .groups = "drop"  
  )

#write_xlsx(finances_Practice_binned_summary, "Binned_Summary.xlsx")

# Summarise the finance data for dispensing
finances_Practice_dispensing <- finances_GROUPED_TOTAL %>%
  left_join(prac_imd, by = c("YEAR", "PRACTICE_CODE")) %>%   
  filter(!is.na(IMD_QUINTILE), YEAR == 2024) %>%                  
  mutate(IMD_QUINTILE = as.factor(IMD_QUINTILE)) %>%             
  group_by(YEAR, Dispensing_Practice) %>%                              
  summarise(
    Global_Sum          = sum(Total.Global.Sum, na.rm = TRUE),
    IT_Premises         = sum(Total.IT.Premises, na.rm = TRUE),
    Other_And_PCOAdmin  = sum(Total.OtherAndPCOAdmin, na.rm = TRUE),
    Directed_Enhanced_Services = sum(Total.DirectedEnhancedServices, na.rm = TRUE),
    ACCESSANDTRANSFORMATION = sum(Total.AccessAndTransFormation, na.rm = TRUE),
    Local_Incentive_Schemes = sum(LIS, na.rm = TRUE),
    Prescribing         = sum(PRESCRIBING_FEE, na.rm = TRUE),
    Dispensing          = sum(DISPENSING_FEE, na.rm = TRUE),
    Deductions          = sum(DEDUCTIONS, na.rm = TRUE),
    DrugReinbursement   = sum(REINBURSMENT_FEE, na.rm = TRUE),
    QOF                 = sum(QOF_PAYMENT, na.rm = TRUE),
    PCNPARTICIPATION    = sum(PCNP, na.rm = TRUE),
    REGISTERED          = sum(REGISTERED_PATIENTS, na.rm = TRUE),
    WEIGHTED            = sum(WEIGHTED_PATIENTS, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )%>%
  mutate(across(
    c(Global_Sum, IT_Premises, Other_And_PCOAdmin, Directed_Enhanced_Services, Local_Incentive_Schemes, Prescribing, Dispensing, DrugReinbursement, QOF, Deductions, PCNPARTICIPATION, ACCESSANDTRANSFORMATION),
    list(
      "Avg (Registered)" = ~ . / REGISTERED,
      "Avg (Weighted)"   = ~ . / WEIGHTED
    ),
    .names = "{.col} {fn}"
  ))

# Define the custom order for categories
ALL_ordered_levels_avg <- rev(c(
  "Global_Sum",
  "IT_Premises",
  "QOF",
  "Local_Incentive_Schemes",
  "Directed_Enhanced_Services",
  "ACCESSANDTRANSFORMATION",
  "PCNPARTICIPATION",
  "Other_And_PCOAdmin",
  "Prescribing",
  "Dispensing",
  "DrugReinbursement",
  "Deductions"
))

barplot_data <- finances_Practice_dispensing %>%
  select(
    Dispensing_Practice,
    ends_with("Avg (Registered)"),
    ends_with("Avg (Weighted)")
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -Dispensing_Practice,
    names_to = c("Payment_Category", "Patient_Type"),
    names_pattern = "^(.*) Avg \\((Registered|Weighted)\\)$",
    values_to = "Avg_Payment"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Group = factor(
      paste(Dispensing_Practice, Patient_Type, sep = " - "),
      levels = c(
         "Yes - Weighted",
        "No - Weighted",
        "Yes - Registered",
        "No - Registered"
      )
    )
  )

barplot_data$Payment_Category <- factor(
  barplot_data$Payment_Category,
  levels = ALL_ordered_levels_avg
)

dispensingPlot <- ggplot(barplot_data,
       aes(y = Group,
           x = Avg_Payment,
           fill = Payment_Category)) +
  geom_col() +
  geom_text(aes(label = round(Avg_Payment, 0)), 
            position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5), 
            color = "black", size = 3) +  
  labs(
    y = NULL,
    x = "Average Payment per Patient",
    fill = "Payment Category"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() 

#write_xlsx(barplot_data, "DispensingNonDispensing.xlsx")

# Summarise GMS vs PMS practices for plot
finances_Practice_GMS_PMS <- finances_GROUPED_TOTAL %>%
  left_join(prac_imd, by = c("YEAR", "PRACTICE_CODE")) %>%     
  filter(!is.na(IMD_QUINTILE), YEAR == 2024) %>%              
  mutate(IMD_QUINTILE = as.factor(IMD_QUINTILE)) %>%             
  group_by(YEAR, CONTRACT_TYPE) %>%                               
  summarise(
    Global_Sum          = sum(Total.Global.Sum, na.rm = TRUE),
    IT_Premises         = sum(Total.IT.Premises, na.rm = TRUE),
    Other_And_PCOAdmin  = sum(Total.OtherAndPCOAdmin, na.rm = TRUE),
    Directed_Enhanced_Services = sum(Total.DirectedEnhancedServices, na.rm = TRUE),
    ACCESSANDTRANSFORMATION = sum(Total.AccessAndTransFormation, na.rm = TRUE),
    Local_Incentive_Schemes = sum(LIS, na.rm = TRUE),
    Prescribing         = sum(PRESCRIBING_FEE, na.rm = TRUE),
    Dispensing          = sum(DISPENSING_FEE, na.rm = TRUE),
    Deductions          = sum(DEDUCTIONS, na.rm = TRUE),
    DrugReinbursement   = sum(REINBURSMENT_FEE, na.rm = TRUE),
    QOF                 = sum(QOF_PAYMENT, na.rm = TRUE),
    PCNPARTICIPATION    = sum(PCNP, na.rm = TRUE),
    REGISTERED          = sum(REGISTERED_PATIENTS, na.rm = TRUE),
    WEIGHTED            = sum(WEIGHTED_PATIENTS, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )%>%
  mutate(across(
    c(Global_Sum, IT_Premises, Other_And_PCOAdmin, Directed_Enhanced_Services, Local_Incentive_Schemes, Prescribing, Dispensing, DrugReinbursement, QOF, Deductions, PCNPARTICIPATION, ACCESSANDTRANSFORMATION),
    list(
      "Avg (Registered)" = ~ . / REGISTERED,
      "Avg (Weighted)"   = ~ . / WEIGHTED
    ),
    .names = "{.col} {fn}"
  ))

# Define the custom order for categories
ALL_ordered_levels_avg <- rev(c(
  "Global_Sum",
  "IT_Premises",
  "QOF",
  "Local_Incentive_Schemes",
  "Directed_Enhanced_Services",
  "ACCESSANDTRANSFORMATION",
  "PCNPARTICIPATION",
  "Other_And_PCOAdmin",
  "Prescribing",
  "Dispensing",
  "DrugReinbursement",
  "Deductions"
))

# Prepare the data
barplot_data_contract <- finances_Practice_GMS_PMS %>%
  select(
    CONTRACT_TYPE,
    ends_with("Avg (Registered)"),
    ends_with("Avg (Weighted)")
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -CONTRACT_TYPE,
    names_to = c("Payment_Category", "Patient_Type"),
    names_pattern = "^(.*) Avg \\((Registered|Weighted)\\)$",
    values_to = "Avg_Payment"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Group = factor(
      paste(CONTRACT_TYPE, Patient_Type, sep = " - "),
      levels = unique(paste(CONTRACT_TYPE, Patient_Type, sep = " - ")) 
    )
  )

barplot_data_contract$Payment_Category <- factor(
  barplot_data_contract$Payment_Category,
  levels = ALL_ordered_levels_avg
)

dispensingPlot_contract <- ggplot(barplot_data_contract,
       aes(y = Group,
           x = Avg_Payment,
           fill = Payment_Category)) +
  geom_col() +
  geom_text(aes(label = round(Avg_Payment, 0)), 
            position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5),  
            color = "black", size = 3) +  
  labs(
    y = NULL,
    x = "Average Payment per Patient",
    fill = "Payment Category"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() 


#create plots for payments by rurality
finances_Practice_Rurality <- finances_GROUPED_TOTAL %>%
  left_join(prac_imd, by = c("YEAR", "PRACTICE_CODE")) %>%     
  filter(!is.na(IMD_QUINTILE), YEAR == 2024) %>%              
  mutate(IMD_QUINTILE = as.factor(IMD_QUINTILE)) %>%             
  group_by(YEAR, Practice_Rurality) %>%                               
  summarise(
    Global_Sum          = sum(Total.Global.Sum, na.rm = TRUE),
    IT_Premises         = sum(Total.IT.Premises, na.rm = TRUE),
    Other_And_PCOAdmin  = sum(Total.OtherAndPCOAdmin, na.rm = TRUE),
    Directed_Enhanced_Services = sum(Total.DirectedEnhancedServices, na.rm = TRUE),
    ACCESSANDTRANSFORMATION = sum(Total.AccessAndTransFormation, na.rm = TRUE),
    Local_Incentive_Schemes = sum(LIS, na.rm = TRUE),
    Prescribing         = sum(PRESCRIBING_FEE, na.rm = TRUE),
    Dispensing          = sum(DISPENSING_FEE, na.rm = TRUE),
    Deductions          = sum(DEDUCTIONS, na.rm = TRUE),
    DrugReinbursement   = sum(REINBURSMENT_FEE, na.rm = TRUE),
    QOF                 = sum(QOF_PAYMENT, na.rm = TRUE),
    PCNPARTICIPATION    = sum(PCNP, na.rm = TRUE),
    REGISTERED          = sum(REGISTERED_PATIENTS, na.rm = TRUE),
    WEIGHTED            = sum(WEIGHTED_PATIENTS, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )%>%
  mutate(across(
    c(Global_Sum, IT_Premises, Other_And_PCOAdmin, Directed_Enhanced_Services, Local_Incentive_Schemes, Prescribing, Dispensing, DrugReinbursement, QOF, Deductions, PCNPARTICIPATION, ACCESSANDTRANSFORMATION),
    list(
      "Avg (Registered)" = ~ . / REGISTERED,
      "Avg (Weighted)"   = ~ . / WEIGHTED
    ),
    .names = "{.col} {fn}"
  ))

# Define the custom order for categories
ALL_ordered_levels_avg <- rev(c(
  "Global_Sum",
  "IT_Premises",
  "QOF",
  "Local_Incentive_Schemes",
  "Directed_Enhanced_Services",
  "ACCESSANDTRANSFORMATION",
  "PCNPARTICIPATION",
  "Other_And_PCOAdmin",
  "Prescribing",
  "Dispensing",
  "DrugReinbursement",
  "Deductions"
))

# Prepare the data
barplot_data_rurality <- finances_Practice_Rurality %>%
  select(
    Practice_Rurality,
    ends_with("Avg (Registered)"),
    ends_with("Avg (Weighted)")
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -Practice_Rurality,
    names_to = c("Payment_Category", "Patient_Type"),
    names_pattern = "^(.*) Avg \\((Registered|Weighted)\\)$",
    values_to = "Avg_Payment"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Group = factor(
      paste(Practice_Rurality, Patient_Type, sep = " - "),
      levels = unique(paste(Practice_Rurality, Patient_Type, sep = " - "))  
    )
  )

# Apply factor ordering separately to Payment_Category
barplot_data_rurality$Payment_Category <- factor(
  barplot_data_rurality$Payment_Category,
  levels = ALL_ordered_levels_avg
)

dispensingPlot_rurality <- ggplot(barplot_data_rurality,
       aes(y = Group,
           x = Avg_Payment,
           fill = Payment_Category)) +
  geom_col() +
  geom_text(aes(label = round(Avg_Payment, 0)), 
            position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5),  
            color = "black", size = 3) +  
  labs(
    y = NULL,
    x = "Average Payment per Patient",
    fill = "Payment Category"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() 

#write.csv(barplot_data_rurality, "barplot_data_rurality.csv", row.names = FALSE)

#plot for list size 
registered_bin_summary <- finances_GROUPED_TOTAL %>%
  left_join(prac_imd, by = c("YEAR", "PRACTICE_CODE")) %>%
  filter(!is.na(IMD_QUINTILE), YEAR == 2024) %>%

  group_by(PRACTICE_CODE) %>%
  summarise(
    Global_Sum          = sum(Total.Global.Sum, na.rm = TRUE),
    IT_Premises         = sum(Total.IT.Premises, na.rm = TRUE),
    Other_And_PCOAdmin  = sum(Total.OtherAndPCOAdmin, na.rm = TRUE),
    Directed_Enhanced_Services = sum(Total.DirectedEnhancedServices, na.rm = TRUE),
    ACCESSANDTRANSFORMATION = sum(Total.AccessAndTransFormation, na.rm = TRUE),
    Local_Incentive_Schemes = sum(LIS, na.rm = TRUE),
    Prescribing         = sum(PRESCRIBING_FEE, na.rm = TRUE),
    Dispensing          = sum(DISPENSING_FEE, na.rm = TRUE),
    Deductions          = sum(DEDUCTIONS, na.rm = TRUE),
    DrugReinbursement   = sum(REINBURSMENT_FEE, na.rm = TRUE),
    QOF                 = sum(QOF_PAYMENT, na.rm = TRUE),
    PCNPARTICIPATION    = sum(PCNP, na.rm = TRUE),

    REGISTERED = sum(REGISTERED_PATIENTS, na.rm = TRUE),
WEIGHTED   = sum(WEIGHTED_PATIENTS, na.rm = TRUE),

    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%

  mutate(
    Patient_Bin = case_when(
      REGISTERED < 5000  ~ "0-4,999",
      REGISTERED < 10000 ~ "5,000-9,999",
      REGISTERED < 15000 ~ "10,000-14,999",
      REGISTERED < 20000 ~ "15,000-19,999",
      TRUE ~ "20,000+"
    )
  ) %>%

  group_by(Patient_Bin) %>%
  summarise(
    across(
      c(Global_Sum, IT_Premises, Other_And_PCOAdmin, Directed_Enhanced_Services,
        ACCESSANDTRANSFORMATION, Local_Incentive_Schemes, Prescribing,
        Dispensing, Deductions, DrugReinbursement, QOF, PCNPARTICIPATION),
      ~ sum(.x, na.rm = TRUE)
    ),
    REGISTERED = sum(REGISTERED, na.rm = TRUE),
    WEIGHTED   = sum(WEIGHTED, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%

  mutate(across(
    c(Global_Sum, IT_Premises, Other_And_PCOAdmin, Directed_Enhanced_Services,
      Local_Incentive_Schemes, Prescribing, Dispensing, DrugReinbursement,
      QOF, Deductions, PCNPARTICIPATION, ACCESSANDTRANSFORMATION),
    list(
      "Avg (Registered)" = ~ . / REGISTERED,
      "Avg (Weighted)"   = ~ . / WEIGHTED
    ),
    .names = "{.col} {fn}"
  ))


#write.csv(Registered_Patients_Finance_Categories, "Reg_Finance.csv", row.names = FALSE)
#write.csv(Weighted_Patients_Finance_Categories, "Weighted_Finance.csv", row.names = FALSE)

#write.csv(barplot_data_rurality, "Rurality_Finance.csv", row.names = FALSE)
#write.csv(barplot_data_contract, "Contract_Finance.csv", row.names = FALSE)
#write.csv(barplot_data, "Dispensing_Finance.csv", row.names = FALSE)
#write.csv(registered_bin_summary, "barplot_data_listsize.csv", row.names = FALSE)
#write.csv(finances_TOTAL, "total_finance.csv", row.names = FALSE)
#write.csv(finances_Practice_binned_summary, "binned_summary_finance.csv", row.names = FALSE)
#write_xlsx(Weighted_Patients_Finance_Categories, "Weighted_Categories.xlsx")
#write_xlsx(Registered_Patients_Finance_Categories, "Registered_Categories.xlsx")


# Create a list of all plots
plot_list <- list(
  Barchart_Registered_Patients_By_Categories,
  Barchart_Weighted_Patients_By_Categories,
  Barchart_Registered_Patients_By_Categories_ALL,
  paymentVariation,
  dispensingPlot,
  dispensingPlot_contract,
  dispensingPlot_rurality
#  dispensingPlot_bins

)

# Export all plots to a single PDF
pdf("All_Finance_Plots_Combined.pdf", width = 10, height = 6)

for (p in plot_list) {
  print(p)
}

dev.off()

message("Saved PDF")

#Below code if for dispensing and rurality tables in report

#Group by just dispensing
finances_Practice_Grouped <- finances_GROUPED_TOTAL %>%
  left_join(prac_imd, by = c("YEAR", "PRACTICE_CODE")) %>%     
  filter(!is.na(IMD_QUINTILE), YEAR == 2024) %>%              
  mutate(IMD_QUINTILE = as.factor(IMD_QUINTILE)) %>%             
  group_by(PRACTICE_CODE, IMD_QUINTILE, Dispensing_Practice) %>%  
  summarise(
    Global_Sum          = sum(Total.Global.Sum, na.rm = TRUE),
    IT_Premises         = sum(Total.IT.Premises, na.rm = TRUE),
    Other_And_PCOAdmin  = sum(Total.OtherAndPCOAdmin, na.rm = TRUE),
    Directed_Enhanced_Services = sum(Total.DirectedEnhancedServices, na.rm = TRUE),
    ACCESSANDTRANSFORMATION = sum(Total.AccessAndTransFormation, na.rm = TRUE),
    Local_Incentive_Schemes = sum(LIS, na.rm = TRUE),
    Prescribing         = sum(PRESCRIBING_FEE, na.rm = TRUE),
    Dispensing          = sum(DISPENSING_FEE, na.rm = TRUE),
    Deductions          = sum(DEDUCTIONS, na.rm = TRUE),
    DrugReinbursement   = sum(REINBURSMENT_FEE, na.rm = TRUE),
    QOF                 = sum(QOF_PAYMENT, na.rm = TRUE),
    PCNPARTICIPATION    = sum(PCNP, na.rm = TRUE),
    REGISTERED          = sum(REGISTERED_PATIENTS, na.rm = TRUE),
    WEIGHTED            = sum(WEIGHTED_PATIENTS, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(across(
    c(Global_Sum, IT_Premises, Other_And_PCOAdmin, Directed_Enhanced_Services, 
      Local_Incentive_Schemes, Prescribing, Dispensing, DrugReinbursement, 
      QOF, Deductions, PCNPARTICIPATION, ACCESSANDTRANSFORMATION),
    list(
      "Avg (Registered)" = ~ . / REGISTERED,
      "Avg (Weighted)"   = ~ . / WEIGHTED
    ),
    .names = "{.col} {fn}"
  ))

disp_summary <- finances_Practice_Grouped %>%
  mutate(
    DISPENSING_FLAG = if_else(Dispensing_Practice == "Yes", 1, 0)
  ) %>%
  group_by(IMD_QUINTILE) %>%
  summarise(
    N_PRACTICES_TOTAL = n_distinct(PRACTICE_CODE),
    N_DISPENSING = sum(DISPENSING_FLAG),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Pct_of_all_practices = N_DISPENSING / N_PRACTICES_TOTAL * 100,
   Pct_of_all_dispensing = N_DISPENSING / sum(N_DISPENSING) * 100
  )


#Group by dispensing and rurality at the same time 
finances_Practice_Grouped_Rurality <- finances_GROUPED_TOTAL %>%
  left_join(prac_imd, by = c("YEAR", "PRACTICE_CODE")) %>%     
  filter(!is.na(IMD_QUINTILE), YEAR == 2024) %>%              
 mutate(IMD_QUINTILE = as.factor(IMD_QUINTILE)) %>%             
  group_by(PRACTICE_CODE, IMD_QUINTILE, Dispensing_Practice, Practice_Rurality) %>%  # include Dispensing_Practice here
  summarise(
    Global_Sum          = sum(Total.Global.Sum, na.rm = TRUE),
    IT_Premises         = sum(Total.IT.Premises, na.rm = TRUE),
    Other_And_PCOAdmin  = sum(Total.OtherAndPCOAdmin, na.rm = TRUE),
    Directed_Enhanced_Services = sum(Total.DirectedEnhancedServices, na.rm = TRUE),
    ACCESSANDTRANSFORMATION = sum(Total.AccessAndTransFormation, na.rm = TRUE),
    Local_Incentive_Schemes = sum(LIS, na.rm = TRUE),
    Prescribing         = sum(PRESCRIBING_FEE, na.rm = TRUE),
    Dispensing          = sum(DISPENSING_FEE, na.rm = TRUE),
    Deductions          = sum(DEDUCTIONS, na.rm = TRUE),
    DrugReinbursement   = sum(REINBURSMENT_FEE, na.rm = TRUE),
    QOF                 = sum(QOF_PAYMENT, na.rm = TRUE),
    PCNPARTICIPATION    = sum(PCNP, na.rm = TRUE),
    REGISTERED          = sum(REGISTERED_PATIENTS, na.rm = TRUE),
    WEIGHTED            = sum(WEIGHTED_PATIENTS, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(across(
    c(Global_Sum, IT_Premises, Other_And_PCOAdmin, Directed_Enhanced_Services, 
      Local_Incentive_Schemes, Prescribing, Dispensing, DrugReinbursement, 
     QOF, Deductions, PCNPARTICIPATION, ACCESSANDTRANSFORMATION),
    list(
      "Avg (Registered)" = ~ . / REGISTERED,
      "Avg (Weighted)"   = ~ . / WEIGHTED
  ),
    .names = "{.col} {fn}"
  ))


finances_Practice_Grouped_Rurality <- finances_Practice_Grouped_Rurality %>%
  filter(!is.na(Practice_Rurality)) %>%
  mutate(
    DISPENSING_FLAG = if_else(Dispensing_Practice == "Yes", 1, 0)
  )

disp_rural_summary <- finances_Practice_Grouped_Rurality %>%
  group_by(IMD_QUINTILE, Practice_Rurality) %>%
  summarise(
    Total_Practices = n_distinct(PRACTICE_CODE),
    Dispensing = sum(DISPENSING_FLAG),
   .groups = "drop"
  )

disp_rural_summary <- disp_rural_summary %>%
 group_by(IMD_QUINTILE) %>%
  mutate(
   Total_Dispensing_Quintile = sum(Dispensing),
    Pct_Rural_of_Total_Dispensing = if_else(
      Practice_Rurality == "Rural",
      Dispensing / Total_Dispensing_Quintile * 100,
      NA_real_  # we only want the percentage for rural rows
    )
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(IMD_QUINTILE, Practice_Rurality, Total_Practices, Dispensing, Pct_Rural_of_Total_Dispensing)



```
